name: Chiffon Ice Box Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 package (4 serving size) OR 1 pkg (8 serving size) gelatin
Black Raspberry, Orange or Black Cherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add the ice cream by spoonfuls, stirring until completely melted.
3. Chill until thickened but still pourable (not completely set).
4. Meanwhile, trim about 1 inch from the ladyfingers and place cut ends against the side of an 8-inch springform pan with rounded sides facing outward.
5. Spoon the thickened gelatin mixture into the pan.
6. Chill until firm, about 3 hours.
7. Remove the side of the pan.
8. Garnish with whipped topping, fresh fruit, and mint leaves if desired.
